description: Rogue Frontier Patch 3 (12 March 2025) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
sections.description: With the introduction of the Gold Market Stabilization system, Common Chests that typically dropped a single Bag of Silver could sometimes be empty. To prevent this without altering the stabilization system, we have moved Silver from Common Chests to higher-value chests, and replaced them with Tomes of Insight to ensure a guaranteed reward.

subsections.heading: Destiny Board Changes

items.text: The Reaver line bonus has been reworked to prevent unintended interactions with spells and other effects

subitems.text: Bonus defense/damage vs mobs should now work as intended for higher-tier enemies
Armor and magic resistance reduction effects are now more effective against higher-tier enemies
Aside from these interactions, there should be no noticeable difference when fighting mobs

subsections.searchable_text: Destiny Board Changes The Reaver line bonus has been reworked to prevent unintended interactions with spells and other effects Bonus defense/damage vs mobs should now work as intended for higher-tier enemies Armor and magic resistance reduction effects are now more effective against higher-tier enemies Aside from these interactions, there should be no noticeable difference when fighting mobs

subsections.heading: Corrupted and Solo Randomized Dungeon Changes

items.text: Common Chests now drop Beginner’s Tomes of Insight instead of Bags of Silver
Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary Chests now contain more Bags of Silver

subsections.searchable_text: Corrupted and Solo Randomized Dungeon Changes Common Chests now drop Beginner’s Tomes of Insight instead of Bags of Silver Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary Chests now contain more Bags of Silver

subsections.heading: UI Changes

items.text: To standardize Cast Time and Cooldown Rate modification values, they now always display a positive value to indicate longer durations and a negative value to indicate reductions

subitems.text: The item stat 'Cast Time Reduction' has been renamed to 'Cast Time' to align with this system

items.text: Reduced chat frequency for /HCE, /LFG, /TR, and /REC by increasing message cooldown from 30 seconds to 2 minutes

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Holy Beam (Holy Staffs) no longer adds a spell effect icon to the target’s buff bar
Hamstring (Swords): Fixed issue where the tooltip displayed an incorrect cooldown
Ambush (Assassin Jacket): The damage buff can now be purged and no longer persists if the caster does not deal damage within the first 7 seconds

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Holy Beam (Holy Staffs) no longer adds a spell effect icon to the target’s buff bar Hamstring (Swords): Fixed issue where the tooltip displayed an incorrect cooldown Ambush (Assassin Jacket): The damage buff can now be purged and no longer persists if the caster does not deal damage within the first 7 seconds

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where icons on the Region Map could duplicate over time
Fixed issue where some tooltips would remain visible and follow the cursor
Fixed issue where Medium Treasure Chests were not visible on the map for players in a neighboring region

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where icons on the Region Map could duplicate over time Fixed issue where some tooltips would remain visible and follow the cursor Fixed issue where Medium Treasure Chests were not visible on the map for players in a neighboring region

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where Elite Cursed Harvester did not count towards the Albion Journal mission ‘Defeat any Reaper or Harvester’
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
